response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong technical fundamentals, multi-language proficiency, and production-scale experience, they lack the critical domain expertise required for this Principal-level role. The resume shows no evidence of building experimentation platforms, metrics/telemetry infrastructure, A/B testing frameworks, or feature-flagging systems—the core focus of this position. For a specialized Principal role in growth and experimentation systems, this experiential gap is disqualifying.
strengths: Broad technical depth across required languages (C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript) with proven ability to ship at massive scale (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby, millions of transactions at Optilyz)
Strong software craftsmanship foundation including TDD, CI/CD, pair programming, and demonstrated thought leadership through talks, workshops, and open-source projects
Full-stack engineering capability spanning backend services, mobile platforms, infrastructure, and DevOps, with current AI/ML tooling exposure at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated experience building or working with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature-flagging systems, or rollout infrastructure—the core responsibility of this role
Limited evidence of designing multi-region, globally distributed systems with high-availability concerns, or building foundational telemetry and metrics infrastructure across teams

Unclear expertise in metrics design, statistical analysis, and experimentation methodology; data work mentioned (pricing optimization, data integration) lacks evidence of experimental rigor and analysis systems
